objective: Reach QQ音乐 search results, activate one visible result-row anchor through a double-click, and verify the resulting now-playing title from the captured evidence image.

distilled_with.note: Model output was reviewed and normalized against the live AUV playback baseline before writing this skill file.

distilled_for.note: This artifact is normalized from live AUV validation so lightweight models can follow an explicit operation chain instead of improvising from raw screenshots.

notes: Search entry is clipboard-backed and pointer-free.
Playback activation still depends on pointer disturbance through a row double-click.
Playback verification is observation-only because it runs OCR over the captured evidence image.
This is a narrow validated playback baseline, not a generalized qqmusic.play_song contract.

steps.purpose: Reveal the QQ音乐 search UI.
Submit the known baseline query while preserving and restoring the clipboard.
Dismiss the search overlay before OCR inspects the result-list region.
Resolve a visible result-row OCR anchor.
Verify the bottom-player title from the captured evidence image.

expected_signals: A result-row OCR anchor is resolved.
The evidence image contains the expected playback title.
non_goals: This artifact does not prove generalized playback for arbitrary rows.
This artifact does not prove Chinese OCR anchor stability.

known_limits.narrow_baseline: Validated around one known query, row anchor, and expected player title.
known_limits.pointer_required: The activation step still uses pointer disturbance.
known_limits.artifact_dependency: Playback verification relies on the captured evidence image from the same run.
known_limits.shared_app_state: Do not run concurrently against the same live QQ音乐 instance.
